text_block_list.name: Dorm Friend
text_block_list.text: On your forehead. There's a red spot.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank goodness. If it's on my forehead, I
should be able to hide it from Tra—

text_block_list.name: Beauty Product Commercial
text_block_list.text:
When your skin is in rough shape, that means
your relationship is too! Skincare is a must when it
comes to love.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I have to go... I gotta go shopping, like, right
now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that skin trouble is serious business for
young women, Mayano Top Gun flies into a
panic.
